# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "3.0"
services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: user-service-auth
        paths:
          - /api/v1/auth
        methods:
          - POST
        strip_path: true
      - name: user-service-profile
        paths:
          - /api/v1/profile
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
        strip_path: true
    upstreams:
      - name: user-service-upstream
        targets:
          - target: user-service-1:8080
            weight: 100
          - target: user-service-2:8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: round_robin
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 60
          policy: local

  - name: product-service
    url: http://product-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: product-service-list
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products
        methods:
          - GET
        strip_path: true
      - name: product-service-create
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products
        methods:
          - POST
        strip_path: true
    upstreams:
      - name: product-service-upstream
        targets:
          - target: product-service-1:8080
            weight: 100
          - target: product-service-2:8080
            weight: 100
          - target: product-service-3:8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: round_robin
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 120
          policy: local

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: order-service-create
        paths:
          - /api/v1/orders
        methods:
          - POST
        strip_path: true
      - name: order-service-status
        paths:
          - /api/v1/orders/status
        methods:
          - GET
        strip_path: true
    upstreams:
      - name: order-service-upstream
        targets:
          - target: order-service-1:8080
            weight: 100
          - target: order-service-2:8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: round_robin
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 100
          policy: local

  - name: payment-service
    url: http://payment-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: payment-service-process
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payment
        methods:
          - POST
        strip_path: true
    upstreams:
      - name: payment-service-upstream
        targets:
          - target: payment-service-1:8080
            weight: 100
          - target: payment-service-2:8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: round_robin
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 200
          policy: local
